name: Catacomb Harvester
reasoning: V3 best adheres to the prompt with a kneeling warlock in tattered dark robes among scattered bones in a proper catacomb setting with visible stone tombs and columns. The spectral wisps coil around the outstretched hand, pale skin and hollow eyes are well-rendered, and the composition reads clearly at card size with strong focal point. V1 has too much blue-teal lighting (more blue than black) and lacks the catacomb architecture; V2 shows the character standing rather than kneeling and has less atmospheric catacomb detail. V3 maintains proper black color identity with heavy shadows, organic textures, and the unsettling asymmetry requested.

artifacts_found.issue: Blue-teal color cast dominates over black; lacks catacomb architecture and stone tombs; character pose is crouching rather than kneeling
Character is standing rather than kneeling as specified; less catacomb atmosphere; golden sparkles feel more whimsical than dark/unsettling
